svg.title: MOSS auto-run architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how MOSS auto-runs scripts on page load and manually via the popup, using blob injection to bypass CSP
svg.title: MOSS auto-run architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how MOSS auto-runs scripts on page load and manually via the popup, using blob injection to bypass CSP

text.style: fill: rgb(8, 80, 65); stroke: none; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 1px; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 1; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-anchor: middle; dominant-baseline: central; white-space: pre;
